assertions.description: U2 is an XC6210B332MR (700mA LDO, lib_id=Regulator_Linear:XC6210B332MR). The signal_analysis.power_regulators correctly identifies it with topology='LDO', input_rail='__unnamed_1', output_rail='+3.3V'. The associated L1 (TBD inductor) connects between +5V and the unnamed VIN net — the LDO is correctly modeled as using the filtered supply. The XC6210 is correctly classified as LDO not switching despite having an inductor on its input side.

The signal_analysis.voltage_dividers correctly identifies R7 (1M) as top and R8 (160K) as bottom with top_net=TASTA_ONLY_BUS, mid_net=GPIO26, bottom_net=GND, ratio=0.138. The mid-point connections to U3 (ESP32-PICO-MINI-02) pin IO26 and TP7 are correctly captured.
